title: C diff risk
script_summary: Exploring the scientific facts behind C diff risk and debunking social media myths.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about C diff risk than social media does.
C diff is a dangerous bacteria that can cause severe diarrhea and more.
But what really increases your risk? Antibiotics play a huge role.
Studies show that taking antibiotics disrupts gut health, allowing C diff to thrive.
Not everyone is at equal risk; age and underlying health matters too.
Stay informed. Follow for more science-based health insights.
